headline: Ventas VTR Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Ventas, Inc. continues to drive growth and outperformance as a leading participant in the longevity economy.  With SHOP as our engine, Ventas, Inc. is now a $6 billion S&P 500 company with a portfolio of over 1,400 properties serving a large and growing aging population.

headline: Ventas Q1 FFO & Revenues Beat Estimates on Strong SHOP Results
summary: VTR posts Q1 FFO and revenue growth as senior housing demand lifted SHOP results, prompting higher 2026 guidance and a bigger investment plan.

headline: Ventas Inc (NYSE:VTR) Shows Strong Earnings Momentum and Promising Technical Setup for Growth Traders
summary: Ventas (VTR) shows strong earnings momentum with 318% YoY EPS growth and a promising technical setup. The stock’s 8/10 Setup Rating suggests a favorable entry point near a potential breakout zone.
